claim_boundary: Boundary Axiom B1 and its intrinsic action are a provisional freeze, not a P1 derivation. Exact intrinsic M4 Lorentz structure is obtained, while one-normalization coefficient locking, the shifted junction background, scalar potential, full spectrum, physical gauge interpretation, absolute units, fermions, and Standard Model closure remain open.
covariance: fixes operator form, not relative normalization
dimensions: fix the powers of a_min but not c_g:c_A:c_sigma
lock_result: no parent-derived relation among c_g, c_A, and c_sigma
representation_traces: fix c_A only after a generator convention and cannot relate it to gravity or a neutral scalar
universal_measure: common integration measure does not equate distinct operator coefficients
